title: Kozhikode、Kerala — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Kozhikode、Kerala的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Kozhikode是Kerala的一個城市，人口約2,000,000。A historic Malabar Coast city where Vasco da Gama first landed, known for its beaches, delicious cuisine, and spice trade heritage.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
